title: Cynorkis citrata
intro: Cynorkis citrata, commonly known as the lemon-flowered Cynorkis, is a species of orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This plant is valued for its potential health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions such as wounds and infections. The bioactive constituents of Cynorkis citrata include flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various ailments.
taxonomy: Cynorkis citrata is classified within the family Orchidaceae and is further classified as a genus within the subfamily Orchidoideae.
